overall.description: A stationary first-person view in a voxel-based game engine showing a stormy winter mountain landscape at night. The scene features a dramatic teal-green aurora-filled sky above snow-dusted terrain with distant dark formations visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain vista under aurora storm sky

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the aurora-filled storm sky and distant mountain terrain

entered.detail: white snow patches on blocky terrain in the immediate foreground
dark turbulent clouds covering the upper sky with teal-green coloring
luminous green aurora borealis effect visible through cloud gaps
silhouetted blocky mountain range on the distant horizon
dark grass-covered voxel terrain extending toward the horizon

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view of a stormy winter night in a voxel game world. The camera overlooks snow-dusted blocky terrain while a dramatic green aurora glows through dark turbulent clouds above the distant mountain silhouette. No movement or changes occur throughout the clip, maintaining a steady atmospheric observation of the landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric observation of a stormy winter night within a voxel-based landscape. It begins with a static panoramic view overlooking snow-dusted blocky terrain under a turbulent sky. As the camera holds its position, a dramatic green aurora continues to glow through dark clouds above the distant mountain silhouettes. The scene remains fixed in this frozen moment, preserving the moody contrast between the glowing celestial lights and the dark, rugged horizon.
